release() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.StyleGroup
Remove all graph elements of this group, and remove this group from the group list of each style rule.

replay() - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.Replayable.Controller
Replay events describing the current state of the object being built by the source.
replay() - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.graphicGraph.GraphicGraph
Replay all the elements of the graph and all attributes as new events to all connected sinks.
replay(String) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.Replayable.Controller
Same as
@link 无效 
#replay(Sink)
but you can set the id of the source sent in events.
replay(Graph) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.stream.GraphReplay
Echo each element and attribute of the graph to the registered sinks.
replay(Replayable, Sink) - 接口中的静态方法 org.graphstream.stream.Replayable
Util method to replay a replayable source into a sink.
Replayable - org.graphstream.stream中的接口
Defines sources that can be replayed.
Replayable.Controller - org.graphstream.stream中的接口
A controller used to replay a source.

reverse(String, Sink) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.util.GraphDiff
 
reverse(Sink) - 类中的方法 org.graphstream.util.GraphDiff
